A proud elven warrior, driven by a sense of duty and honor, they lead their people in defense of their ancestral lands.
A young human farmer with a secret talent for magic, they dream of adventure beyond their humble village and the chance to prove their worth.
Mythalia:Owlian Coast:Siren's Respite: An elf in their prime, bearing the scars of a life spent at sea, driven by an insatiable thirst for adventure and a desire to uncover the secrets of the ancient ruins scattered across Mythalia.
A young human scholar, brimming with curiosity and a burning desire to unravel the mysteries of magic, despite the skepticism of their peers.
A grizzled dwarven veteran, haunted by the horrors of war, seeking solace in the bottom of a bottle, their once bright eyes now dulled by pain and regret.
An owl person, a shrewd business owner in their middle years, who has built an empire on the Owlian Coast, but whose ambition threatens to consume them.
A merfolk, a guardian of the Siren's Respite's coastal waters, with a deep connection to the sea gods, fiercely protective of their domain and those who dwell within it.
A human-owl hybrid, torn between two worlds, struggling to find their place in society, their unique abilities both a blessing and a curse.
A gnome, a brilliant inventor whose creations have revolutionized life on the Owlian Coast, their boundless creativity matched only by their eccentricity.
An ancient dragon, slumbering beneath the mountains, dreaming of a time when magic was plentiful, and their kind ruled the skies.
A fae creature, playful and mischievous, with a penchant for leading travelers astray, their true motives hidden beneath a veneer of innocence.
A human from the House of Strigidae, a gifted diplomat and tactician, who must navigate the treacherous waters of Mythalia's politics to ensure their family's continued prosperity.
A dwarf, a master craftsman whose skill with metal and stone is unmatched, driven by a desire to create works of lasting beauty in a world where magic is but a memory.
A human, a farmer who has lived their entire life in the shadow of the imposing cliffs of Siren's Respite, their life shaped by the rhythms of the earth and the changing of the seasons.
A fox spirit, a trickster who delights in exposing the foibles of the powerful, but whose actions may have unintended consequences.
An undead, a former member of a noble house who has risen from the grave, seeking to reclaim their lost power and exact revenge on those who betrayed them.
A unicorn, a creature of purity and grace, whose healing powers are sought after by many, but whose true strength lies in their unbreakable spirit.
A phoenix, a being of fire and rebirth, whose very existence is a testament to the resilience of life in a world where magic is a rare and precious resource.
A kitsune, a shapeshifter who moves effortlessly through the various cultures of Mythalia, gathering secrets and playing both sides against the middle.
A basilisk, a fearsome monster who lurks in the depths of the ancient ruins, their gaze capable of turning the unwary to stone.
A gorgon, a tragic figure cursed with serpentine hair and a gaze that can petrify, seeking a way to break the curse that has defined their existence.
A human sorcerer, a master of the few remaining sources of magical power, driven by a desire to restore magic to the world, but whose hunger for knowledge may lead them down a dark path.
Mythalia:Owlian Coast:Siren's Respite:Th: A resilient human in their mid-30s, hardened by the horrors of the apocalypse. They are resourceful and cautious, having lost loved ones to the infection. Haunted by their past, they are driven by a fierce determination to protect their community within The Bulwark Bazaar.

A young elf, no more than 20, who has grown up within the fortified walls of The Bulwark Bazaar. Despite their youth, they possess a wisdom beyond their years, having been forced to confront the harsh realities of their world. They are driven by a deep sense of compassion, often putting others' needs before their own.

An older dwarf, a skilled blacksmith who has turned their trade to crafting weapons for the survivors. They are gruff and pragmatic, their demeanor shaped by the loss of their family in the early days of the apocalypse. They find solace in their work, driven by a need to contribute to the community's survival.

A middle-aged human, a former scholar who has found a new purpose in chronicling the stories of the survivors within The Bulwark Bazaar. They are introspective and perceptive, their keen intellect an asset in the fight against the infected. They are driven by a need to preserve the knowledge of the past, fearing that humanity's history may be lost forever.

A young adult from the House of Strigidae, born and raised in the Owlian Coast. They are cunning and ambitious, their personality shaped by the political intrigues within their noble family. Driven by a desire to prove themselves, they have ventured to The Bulwark Bazaar to test their mettle against the horrors of the apocalypse.

An elder of the community, a human in their late 60s who has seen the rise and fall of civilizations. They are wise and patient, their advanced age a testament to their resilience. They serve as the moral compass of The Bulwark Bazaar, driven by a deep senseed to guide the younger generations.

A young orphan, a human no older than 12, who has grown up on the streets of Siren's Respite. They are resourceful and tenacious, their survival skills honed by a life of hardship. Despite their youth, they have found a place within The Bulwark Bazaar, driven by a need to belong.

A former soldier, a human in their early 30s, whose combat skills have proven invaluable in the fight against the infected. They are haunted by their experiences in the military, their bravery tempered by the weight of the lives they have taken. They are driven by a need to atone, finding redemption in the protection of the innocent.

A middle-aged healer, an elf who has dedicated their life to tending to the wounded and the sick. They are compassionate and selfless, their healing abilities a beacon of hope in the darkness. They are driven by a deep sense of duty, believing that every life is worth saving.

A mysterious figure, their species and age unknown, cloaked in secrecy. They are a skilled scavenger, able to navigate the treacherous ruins of Mythalia in search of supplies. Their past is a closely guarded secret, their motives unclear. They are driven by an inscrutable purpose, their actions hinting at hidden depths.

An outcast, a dwarf shunned by their clan for their unconventional beliefs. They have found a new home within The Bulwark Bazaar, their skills as a miner and engineer proving invaluable. They are driven by a need to belong, their innovative ideas a source of hope for the future.

A middle-aged elf with a mysterious past, haunted by the loss of their magical abilities. They are driven by a thirst for knowledge, hoping to uncover the secrets of the ancient ruins scattered throughout Mythalia.

A young, ambitious member of the House of Strigidae, eager to prove their worth and rise through the ranks. They are cunning and resourceful, using their wit to navigate the complex political landscape of the Owlian Coast.

An aging dwarf who has seen the rise and fall of empires, now seeking solace in the bustling coastal town. They are gruff and standoffish, but with a heart of gold, always ready to lend a helping hand to those in need.

A mischievous fairy with a penchant for causing trouble, using their small size and quick wit to play pranks on unsuspecting townsfolk. They are secretly lonely, longing for a true friend to share in their adventures.
A grizzled human soldier, scarred by years of battle and haunted by the atrocities they have witnessed. They have renounced violence, seeking redemption in the service of the House of Strigidae.
A naive young mermaid, drawn to the glittering lights of Siren's Respite. They are fascinated by the world above the waves, eager to learn more about the strange customs of the land-dwellers.

A wise, elderly dragon who has slumbered for centuries, awakened by the stirring of ancient magic. They seek to understand the changes that have befallen the world, guided by a deep reverence for the old ways.
A cunning and ambitious human merchant, seeking to rise in social status through any means necessary. They are not above using bribery, blackmail, or even violence to achieve their goals.
A young, rebellious member of a secret organization, driven by a desire to overthrow the ruling House of Strigidae. They are idealistic and passionate, but often reckless in their pursuit of justice.
A charismatic half-elf bard, beloved by the people for their enchanting melodies and captivating tales. They hold a secret, a powerful magical artifact that has drawn the attention of dangerous foes.

A curious gnome inventor, constantly tinkering with new gadgets and contraptions. They dream of unlocking the secrets of the ancient magic that once flowed through Mythalia, but their creations often malfunction in humorous ways.
A stoic, honor-bound orc who has forsaken their warrior past to become a guardian of the sacred groves. They are slow to trust, but fiercely loyal to those who earn their respect.

A sly, seductive succubus who runs the Owlian Oasis, using their charms to gather information and manipulate those in power. They are a master of disguise, able to blend seamlessly into any social setting.
A young, naive dryad, newly emerged from their forest home to explore the wonders of the world. They are innocent and trusting, often falling victim to the machinations of those with ill intentions.
A cynical, world-weary tiefling who has seen the darkest corners of Mythalia. They are a skilled thief and assassin, using their abilities to take on dangerous jobs that others fear to accept.
A free-spirited tabaxi who has traveled the world in search of new experiences and adventures. They are a skilled martial artist, able to hold their own against opponents twice their size.
A proud, noble centaur who has been forced to leave their homeland due to a tragic betrayal. They seek vengeance against those who wronged them, while also searching for a new place to call home.

A wise, ancient treant who has watched empires rise and fall from their vantage point in the heart of the forest. They hold the secrets of the past, but are reluctant to share them with those who may use them for ill.
A brave, compassionate unicorn who has been charged with protecting the sacred glades from those who would defile them. They are a symbol of hope and purity in a world often filled with darkness.

A clever, mischievous kitsune who uses their shape-shifting abilities to play elaborate pranks on unsuspecting victims. They are driven by a intense curiosity, often finding themselves in situations that are both dangerous and hilarious.
Mythalia:Owlian Coast:Whisperwind Cavern: A middle-aged elf from a noble family, known for their sharp wit and strategic mind, seeks to navigate the complex political landscape to bring their House greater power and influence.
A young, orphaned human, skilled in theft and deception, driven by a desire to uncover their true lineage among the clans.
An ancient dwarf, last of their kind, haunted by the loss of their homeland, seeks to protect the magical relics of their people from falling into the wrong hands.
A charismatic owlian merchant in their prime, known for their ability to strike deals and navigate the treacherous waters of commerce, aims to expand their influence beyond the Owlian Coast.
A naive, young unicorn, exiled from their herd, embarks on a journey of self-discovery while trying to harness their latent magical abilities.
A grizzled, former soldier of a once-powerful House, now a mercenary, battles with their inner demons while seeking redemption for past sins.
A brilliant scholar of mixed heritage, obsessed with uncovering the secrets of the Whisperwind Caverns, driven by the belief that the caves hold the key to restoring magic to the world.
A cunning, middle-aged dragon, disguised as a wealthy merchant, manipulates the clans and Houses from the shadows in a bid for power.
A young adult, part of a secret organization, works tirelessly to undermine the rule of the House of Strigidae, believing that the current system is corrupt and oppressive.
A conflicted, teenage member of the House of Strigidae, torn between loyalty to their family and a desire to forge their own path.
An eccentric, elderly human artist, renowned for their ability to capture the beauty and mystery of the Owlian Coast in their paintings, seeks to create their masterpiece before their time runs out.
A charismatic, middle-aged owlian, leader of a group of smugglers, navigates the treacherous waters of the Whisperwind Caverns while trying to stay one step ahead of the law.
A young adult fisherman, haunted by the loss of their father to the sea, seeks to uncover the truth behind the mysterious entity known as the Whisperer.
An ambitious, young dwarven blacksmith, seeks to create the ultimate weapon, believing that it will bring them fame and fortune.
A kindhearted, elderly elf, last of their clan, uses their knowledge of ancient magic to help those in need, hoping to restore the balance of power.
A courageous, young owlian warrior, trained in the art of swordplay, seeks to prove their worth to the House of Strigidae.
A sly, middle-aged human diplomat, skilled in manipulation, works to forge alliances between the various clans and Houses, all while hiding a dark secret.
A young, idealistic noble from a minor House, seeks to bring about change and equality, believing that the current system is flawed and oppressive.
A mysterious, elderly figure, known only as 'The Wanderer,' travels the land, sharing tales and legends of the world before magic faded.
A cunning, teenage thief, with a knack for finding rare artifacts, seeks to make a name for themselves in the underworld of the Owlian Coast.
Riftworld:Rhode Island:Providence:The El: A human scholar in their late 30s, brilliant but eccentric, driven by an insatiable curiosity about the otherworldly horrors. They have traveled extensively, witnessing firsthand the incursion of cosmic entities overcoming personal fears.

A grizzled veteran of the Eldritch Precinct in their mid-40s, a battle-scarred human with a grim determination to protect the city from both mundane and supernatural threats. They have lost partners to the horrors, leaving deep emotional scars.

A teenage human from the fishing community, approximately 16 years old, with a keen intuition and a budding psychic ability. They are compassionate and eager to help others, driven to uncover the truth behind their sibling's disappearance.

A wealthy socialite in their early 30s, human, with a hidden agenda as they secretly fund an order dedicated to harnessing the power of the otherworldly entities. They are cunning and manipulative, seeking to gain ultimate power.

A non-human entity, ageless and enigmatic, with the ability to assume human form. They are driven by a deep-seated desire to understand human emotion, often acting as both ally and adversary, guided by their own inscrutable motives.

A human university professor in their mid-50s, specializing in occult history, haunted by the loss of their spouse to a supernatural entity. They are a brilliant strategist and vital to the city's defense, yet consumed by a thirst for revenge.

A human street urchin of about 12 years, orphaned by the horrors that plague the city, but possessing a fierce survival instinct. They have become a master of gathering information, navigating the streets with uncanny ease, and dream of a life beyond the shadows.

A human former soldier turned monster hunter in their late 20s, struggling with PTSD while tirelessly tracking and eliminating interdimensional threats. They are brave and determined, often flirting with death, seeking redemption for a past failure.

A member of a secretive order, human, in their early 40s, skilled in arcane arts and deeply devoted to their beliefs. They straddle the line between scholar and cultist, driven to prove that humans can control the cosmic horrors for the greater good.

An enterprising human merchant in their mid-30s, well-connected and adaptable, providing essential supplies to both scholars and defenders. They are motivated by profit but also believe in protecting the city, playing a dangerous game of balancing interests.
Riftworld:Rhode Island:Providence: A brilliant but eccentric human scholar in their 50s, driven by an insatiable curiosity. Their exposure to the horrors has left them both fearless and slightly unhinged, making them a valuable but unpredictable ally.
A young, idealistic fisherman turned militia member, aged around 25. He's witnessed the horrors firsthand and is dedicated to protecting his home, but struggles with the moral ambiguity of the fight.

A cunning, middle-aged human cultist, around 40, who believes the horrors can be controlled for personal gain. Their ambition is matched only by their willingness to manipulate others, a trait forged by years of navigating the city's shadowy underworld.

A world-weary, non-human entity trapped in our dimension, several centuries old. Despite their innate power, they long for the tranquility of their home and are willing to aid those who can help them return.
An orphaned teenage human, around 16, gifted with the ability to sense otherworldly presences. Their youth belies a grim determination to uncover the truth behind the horrors that took their family.

A seasoned, battle-hardened human soldier in their early 30s, scarred by encounters with the unknown. They've seen the worst of the horrors and emerged stronger, but not unscathed, driven by a need to protect others from the same fate.

A charismatic, middle-aged human professor with a dark secret, around 45. They've made groundbreaking discoveries about the horrors, but their methods are questionable at best, and their true motives remain hidden.

A young, naive university student, around 20, fascinated by the supernatural. Their thirst for knowledge is admirable, but their lack of experience leaves them vulnerable to manipulation by cultists and other dark forces.

An ancient, enigmatic being, neither human nor entirely alien, that has lived among humans for generations. Their motives are inscrutable, but they seem to be drawn to the university's research, offering cryptic hints and assistance.

A grizzled, older human fisherman with a deep mistrust of the university, around 60. They've lost friends and family to the horrors and blame the scholars for waking things best left undisturbed. Their bitterness is tempered by a fierce loyalty to their community.
Riftworld:Rhode Island:Providence:The Cr: A human scholar in their early forties, driven by an insatiable thirst for knowledge about the otherworldly horrors. They are brilliant and resourceful, having spent years studying and cataloging the supernatural entities, but their obsession has left them isolated and paranoid.

A young fisherman in their late teens, struggling to make a living in the shadow of the university's influence. They are hardworking and loyal, supporting their family through the meager earnings from their catches, but they secretly yearn for a life beyond the confines of the city.

A supernatural entity that has taken human form to blend in with society. They are ancient and malevolent, seeking to spread chaos and despair among the unsuspecting populace, but their time among humans has caused them to develop a fascination with mortal emotions and relationships.

A grizzled veteran in their fifties who has seen the horrors of the otherworldly threats firsthand. They are battle-hardened and cynical, having lost faith in the university's ability to protect the city, and now spend their days drowning their sorrows at The Crawling Tentacle.

A brilliant university student in their early twenties, whose groundbreaking research into the tears in reality has earned them both admiration and envy from their peers. They are ambitious and driven, determined to uncover the secrets of the multiverse, but their relentless pursuit of knowledge has left them blind to the dangers that lurk in the shadows.

A charismatic cult leader in their thirties, who believes that the otherworldly entities can be controlled and harnessed for their own gain. They are manipulative and ruthless, using their silver tongue and magnetic personality to recruit followers and sow discord within the city.

An aging professor of the university, whose decades of research into the supernatural have left them both wise and world-weary. They are a mentor to many of the younger scholars, but their own experiences have led them to question the morality of their work and the true nature of the horrors they study.

A streetwise orphan in their early teens, who has survived the harsh realities of the city by relying on their wits and quick reflexes. They are resilient and adaptable, navigating the treacherous streets with ease, but their lack of formal education has left them vulnerable to manipulation by those who would exploit their talents.

A wealthy merchant in their forties, whose business empire has been built on the trade of rare and exotic goods from distant lands. They are shrewd and calculating, with a vast network of contacts and resources at their disposal, but their relentless pursuit of profit has left them with few true allies and many enemies.

A reclusive artist in their late twenties, whose haunting paintings capture the essence of the otherworldly horrors that threaten the city. They are enigmatic and introverted, rarely venturing out of their studio, but their work has caught the attention of both the university and the secretive cults that seek to harness the power of the supernatural entities.
Riftworld:Rhode Island:Providence:The Si: A human professor in their 50s who is brilliant yet eccentric, driven by an insatiable curiosity about the otherworldly horrors. Growing up in Providence, they have seen the toll these beings take on people's lives, fueling their determination to understand and stop them.

A young, non-human entity in their 20s who has crossed over from another dimension. Compassionate and conflicted, they struggle to understand human ways while trying to find their place in this strange world. The pollution and despair in the Sighing Tenements resonate with them, drawing them to the location.

A fisherman in his 30s, grizzled and tough, but with a keen intelligence, he has encountered oddities while out at sea that have opened his eyes to the horrors that threaten his world. He is a man of action, determined to protect his home and aware that knowledge is power in these trying times.

A ageless being, a scholar of the macabre who has lived for centuries, studying the arcane horrors from beyond. Their knowledge is vast, but so is their arrogance, believing that they alone can unlock the secrets of these beings. Their experiences have left them jaded and calculating.

A young student, brilliant and driven, who has come to Providence to study the otherworldly threats. They are idealistic and brave, eager to make their mark and save their world, even as they are forced to confront the darkness that lurks within human nature.

A member of a secret society, mid 30s, cunning and resourceful, who believes that the horrors can be controlled and harnessed for their own ends. They have risen through the ranks of their organization, shaped by a life of intrigue and danger.

A factory worker in their late 20s who has lost everything to the horrors that have invaded their world. Traumatized yet resilient, they are determined to fight back against the darkness, even as they struggle to make ends meet in the Sighing Tenements.

An artist in their early 20s, sensitive and imaginative, whose work is inspired by the horrors that now haunt the world. They are driven to capture the essence of these beings in their art, even as they are haunted by visions of the horrors to come.

A child of the streets, barely in their teens, who has grown up in the shadow of the university and its dark secrets. Sharp-witted and resourceful, they have learned to navigate the city's underbelly, seeking to uncover the truth behind the horrors that threaten their home.

A ageless entity, a being of pure malevolence who wears a human guise, they have crossed over from another dimension to spread chaos and despair. They are drawn to the darkness in human hearts, seeking to corrupt and destroy all that they encounter.
